meaning: adv.不知疲倦地,不屈不挠地
examples: Her secretaries work tirelessly for a pittance.
He worked tirelessly for the cause of health and safety.
Mark is a bit annoying in talking tirelessly about it.
And I just want to thank everybody who's worked tirelessly here to deal with this tragedy.
It said Mr Evans was "widely liked and respected" and had "worked tirelessly" for his constituents.
